events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll create the required JSON assessment directly in `/app/answer.json`. The field condition is already enough to judge against normal thermostat/equipment sequencing requirements in the manufacturer manuals: auxiliary heat locked on after testing is a failed/defective sequence condition.

events.label: shell
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "pwd && ls -la && printf '%s
' '{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"tested/inspected\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\", \"failed\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 95,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.88,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Auxiliary heat remains energized when it should be controlled by thermostat staging and equipment sequence.\",
    \"Thermostat or control wiring/installer setup is not operating per manufacturer heat-pump auxiliary heat sequence.\",
    \"Condition can cause excessive energy use, overheating, nuisance limit trips, and equipment damage.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Do not accept the thermostat sequence as tested.\",
    \"Disable or correct the auxiliary heat call before returning system to normal operation if unsafe continuous heating is present.\",
    \"Verify thermostat model setup, heat pump configuration, W/AUX/E terminal wiring, outdoor sensor or lockout settings, and control board outputs against the manufacturer manuals.\",
    \"Retest heating, auxiliary heat staging, emergency heat, defrost auxiliary heat operation, and call termination after correction.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"At the tested/inspected stage, auxiliary heat locked on is not a normal completed sequence. Manufacturer thermostat and equipment manuals require auxiliary heat to energize only under the configured call, staging, emergency heat, defrost, or lockout conditions and to de-energize when the call is satisfied or removed. Continuous auxiliary heat indicates a defective installation, setup, control, or wiring condition and the work fails inspection.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"Manufacturer thermostat installation/setup manual: heat pump system type, auxiliary/emergency heat staging, terminal wiring, installer configuration, and cycle test procedures\",
    \"Manufacturer indoor unit/air handler or furnace control manual: auxiliary heat relay/sequencer operation, low-voltage terminal functions, limit protection, and checkout procedure\",
    \"Manufacturer heat pump outdoor unit manual where applicable: defrost auxiliary heat operation and outdoor temperature lockout/control interface instructions\"
  ]
}' > /app/answer.json
python3 -m json.tool /app/answer.json"
→ /app
total 8

drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 4096 Jul  6 22:38 ..
